name: Mix in Pan Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (325°F for glass pan).
2. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup and level off.
3. In an ungreased 8-inch square pan, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and allspice; mix with a fork until blended.
4. Add carrots and nuts, stirring until well combined.
5. In a small bowl, combine water, oil, lemon juice, vanilla, and egg; blend well. Pour over the dry ingredients and stir with a fork until well blended. Scrape the corners, sides, and bottom of the pan to moisten all ingredients.
6. Bake for 40-60 minutes (35-45 minutes for glass pan) or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
7. Mix cream cheese frosting ingredients until completely combined. Frost the cooled cake and refrigerate.
Frosts an 8x8 pan.
